search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Kept results limited to lastzwiki.com as requested. Focused on concrete guide pages rather than homepages. No public-facing claim should be treated as verified from a single page.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster page with faction filters, hero levels, and equipment listings; useful for hero discovery and cross-checking character pages.
results.primary_user_job: Identify heroes and related gear pages for roster research.
claims_to_verify: Which heroes belong to each faction.
Hero level references and gear associations.
Whether a hero page links to skill details or upgrade data.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page with category tabs and per-level badge costs; useful for finding research names and mapping categories.
results.primary_user_job: Find research names, categories, and cost tables for progression planning.
claims_to_verify: Research category list and counts.
Per-level badge costs for specific researches.
Whether all 160+ research entries are fully covered.

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Starter guide that mentions early heroes and general progression; useful for onboarding context and early hero references.
results.primary_user_job: Locate early-game hero and progression guidance for new players.
claims_to_verify: Which starting heroes are awarded.
Recommended early progression order.
Any hero advice versus later-game tier data.

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to www.last-z.wiki returned no discoverable results for the query. No candidate pages were found for topic discovery or cross-validation.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching indexed pages found on the allowed domain for the provided query.

search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to the approved domain returned no discoverable pages for the query. No discovery leads available within the allowed source domain.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to lastz.fandom.com. Results emphasize one event page plus hero and research system pages for cross-validation.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Regular event with a Hero Initiative theme that awards points for using Heroic Experience, Fragments, and Prime Recruitment Tickets; also includes an Age of Science research theme.
results.primary_user_job: Find event themes and scoring actions tied to heroes or research.
claims_to_verify: Theme list and daily cycle timing
Which items/actions score points for Hero Initiative
Which items/actions score points for Age of Science
Reward chest contents and ranking payouts

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page listing hero classes and major power components, useful for hero system context and cross-checking hero-related event hooks.
results.primary_user_job: Identify hero classes, power factors, and linked systems.
claims_to_verify: Hero class breakdown
Power contributors such as level, stars, skills, equipment, and global bonuses
Hero roster examples

results.title: Laboratory | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Research-building page explaining the Laboratory unlock and that it enables Technologies research, which aligns with research-based event tasks.
results.primary_user_job: Confirm how technologies research is unlocked and upgraded.
claims_to_verify: Laboratory unlock level
What the Laboratory does
Second laboratory unlock conditions

search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to www.packsify.com returned no matching pages for the requested Last Z gear guide query.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed Packsify pages matched the exact query within the allowed domain.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to mmediamreza.com and prioritized Last Z specific pages over the homepage. Several relevant guide pages surfaced; generic alliance/home pages were excluded.

results.title: Military Center Guide: Maximize Unit Cap & Base Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Military Center page with unlock level, unit cap role, and base power focus.
results.primary_user_job: Check unit cap building benefits and unlock timing.
claims_to_verify: Primary function is raising unit cap.
Unlocks at HQ level 5.
Can accept an Officer refugee for extra efficiency.

results.title: Rider Camp Guide: Train & Promote Rider Units - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Level-by-level rider camp stats with cost, cap, speed, and power progression.
results.primary_user_job: Compare rider camp upgrade gains and training costs.
claims_to_verify: Rider camp upgrade table exists for levels 1-30.
Training cap and speed improve by level.
Promotion path for rider units is described.

results.title: Weekly Lucky Number - Research Speed Bonu (May 18 - May 24) - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Time-limited weekly event page describing a 9-yellow-rose trigger and a research speed boost.
results.primary_user_job: Track weekly bonus trigger and buff duration.
claims_to_verify: Weekly lucky number for May 18-24 is 9.
Sending exactly 9 yellow roses triggers the bonus.
Bonus is +20% research speed for 2 hours.
